name: Date & Time
description: Date and time with configurable timezone

timezone.label: Timezone
timezone.hint: IANA timezone (e.g. Europe/Lisbon, America/New_York). Leave empty for system default.

show_date.label: Show date
show_date.hint: Display the date next to the time

show_year.label: Show year
show_year.hint: Display the year in the date

show_next_month.label: Show next month in popup
show_next_month.hint: Open the calendar with the current month and the next one side by side

show_events.label: Show event dots
show_events.hint: Show dots on days with alarms or events in the calendar popup

delete_old_events_days.label: Delete past events after (days)
delete_old_events_days.hint: One-shot events older than this are removed automatically
